_comment: NPC: Hunchback Meng (驼背孟). Canon ID: N91. Per user directive: every miscellaneous NPC from RI must be accounted for. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every being described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Hunchback Meng

dao_heart.note: 0-100. A cracked Dao heart blocks breakthrough regardless of Qi. Per canon: Wang Lin's Dao heart is famously tested at every major realm.

initiation_lines: Do not look at my back. Look at what I can do. What I can do is far more interesting than my appearance.
I have been inside the Soul Refining Ancestral Ground more times than anyone alive. Sixty-three times. Each time, the ancestors tried to keep me. I am still here. They are not.
Wang Lin entered the Ancestral Ground once. He left with the Ten Billion Soul Banner. I have entered sixty-three times and left with scars. The difference is not talent. It is ruthlessness.
Obsidian and bones. The Ancestral Ground demands payment. If you wish to enter, I can tell you what to bring. Whether you leave is not my concern.

sect_tasks.name: Ancestral Ground Supplies
sect_tasks.description: Hunchback Meng needs obsidian and bones to prepare for his next Ancestral Ground expedition.

sect_tasks.name: Ancestral Formation Knowledge
sect_tasks.description: Meng trades knowledge of Ancestral Ground formations for jade slips and experience.
